ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "time_s" INTEGER /* Timestamp in seconds */,
  "int_temp_c" REAL /* Internal temperature in Celsius */,
  "int_temp_f" REAL /* Internal temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "int_humid" REAL /* Internal humidity percentage */,
  "ext_temp_c" REAL /* External temperature in Celsius */,
  "ext_temp_f" REAL /* External temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "ext_humid" REAL /* External humidity percentage */,
  "ravg_int_temp_c" REAL /* Running average of internal temperature in Celsius */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current electrical current in amps */,
  "pid_i" INTEGER /* Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID) control value */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "sensor_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor location */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Measure of the quality of the data collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number for the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_location_id") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "sensor_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor location */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the sensor */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of sensor calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_location_id") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance range for the sensor measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control action */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry that triggered the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of control action (e.g., increase temperature, decrease humidity) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action */,
  "action_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action in seconds */,
  "initiated_by" TEXT /* User or system that initiated the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_actions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry that triggered the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., high temperature, low humidity) */,
  "alarm_description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "triggered_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alarm was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alarm (e.g., active, acknowledged, cleared) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alarm */,
  "acknowledged_by" TEXT /* User who acknowledged the alarm */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alarm was acknowledged */,
  "cleared_by" TEXT /* User who cleared the alarm */,
  "cleared_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alarm was cleared */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department table */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last logout */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry accessed (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "action_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's action in seconds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the location is situated */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor where the location is situated */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room where the location is situated */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
